title: Support `checker`
body:
Thanks for taking the time to report this.

What would you like added/supported?
> checker..endchecker - LRM added these as containers for SVA. Though it has few additional features/benefits, a reasonable starting point can be as simple as treating them as module (ideally interface, but maybe Verilator has special code for it - to pass as port items etc.). For sure "procedural checker instantiation" is a far fetch and won't work with "module" approach. Also making it as module will prevent checker being bound to interfaces. Maybe there is better way?

Can you attach an example that runs on other simulators?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?

> Yes please, will attempt.
